title: Weather Volume Clouds
description: A large-world volumetric cloud composition using the package CloudsEffect, CloudsPass, ShadowPass, cascaded cloud shadow maps, local weather, 128-cubed shape and 32-cubed detail volumes, turbulence, STBN jitter, NormalPass deferred lighting, AerialPerspectiveEffect atmosphere composition, lens flare, AGX tone mapping, and dithering.
techniques: bounded layer interval selection and cascaded cloud shadows
